assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 17-24: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' followed by 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 (the feature branch), not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 101: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" --body "..."'. The --base flag explicitly targets TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 23-24: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and line 27: 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID). The base branch is TC-9005 (the feature branch).' The task branch TC-9205 is clearly distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 31-47: The 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' section explicitly references inspecting all three files: 'Inspect migration/src/lib.rs' (line 33), 'Inspect migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' (line 35), and 'Inspect entity/src/advisory.rs' (line 37). Additionally, file-1-description.md and file-2-description.md both contain 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' sections referencing these files.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 79: 'With the trailer flag: --trailer=\'Assisted-by: Claude Code\'' and line 83: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 67-77: The commit message starts with 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat' and scope 'migration'), and the footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 11-13: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)' and lines 15-16: 'The Target Branch specified in the task description is TC-9005. This is a feature branch, not main. All branch operations and the PR must target this branch.' The plan has a dedicated 'Target Branch' section explicitly extracting this information.
